response.text:
The display is in an eye/jitter analysis setup on Ref 1.

Visible items:
- Eye diagram plot for Meas 1 at upper right
- TIE histogram at upper left-middle
- Bathtub curve at center-left
- TIE spectrum at lower left
- Waveform view at lower right
- Measurement Results table at upper left

Only three measurements are listed now:
- Meas 1: Jitter Summary
- Meas 2: Period
- Meas 3: Frequency

So Meas 4 through Meas 8 are no longer present.

Key values shown:
- Data rate: 2.501 Gb/s
- Eye midlevel: about 80.357 µV
- UI count: 3341/4995, total 3341/4995
- Period mean: 1.066 ns
- Frequency mean: 1.106 GHz

Jitter summary panel shows examples like:
- TIE rms: 8.681 ps
- TJ@: 54.07 ps
- RJ: 1.680 ps
- DJ: 33.75 ps
- EW@: 345.9 ps

Scope status:
- Horizontal: 200 ns/div
- Acquisition: Single
- Ref 1 scale: 200 mV/div
- Sample rate: 20 GS/s
- Instrument appears Offline in the lower-right status area.
